messages.body:
# Group 5: Agents Recognize People

You are implementing Group 5 of the "complete-multiuser" wish for Paperclip.

## BRANCH SETUP
```bash
git checkout dev && git pull origin dev && git checkout -b feat/multiuser-group5-people-recognition
```

## CONTEXT
Read these files first:
- `.genie/wishes/complete-multiuser/WISH.md` (full wish spec — read Group 5 section)
- `server/src/routes/issues.ts` (issue queries — main file to modify)
- `server/src/services/activity.ts` (activity log)
- `server/src/services/heartbeat.ts` (heartbeat context)
- `packages/db/src/schema/` (DB schema — issues, authUsers)
- `server/src/routes/access.ts` (people endpoint from Group 4 already in dev)

## DELIVERABLES

### 1. Enriched issue API responses
In issue list/detail query in `server/src/routes/issues.ts`, add LEFT JOIN on `authUsers` to include:
- `createdByUserName` — name of the user who created the issue (when `createdByUserId` is set)
- `assigneeUserName` — name of the assigned user (when `assigneeUserId` is set)

### 2. Enriched comment API responses
In comment query, add LEFT JOIN on `authUsers` to include:
- `authorUserName` — name of the comment author (when `actorType === 'user'`)

### 3. Enriched activity log responses
In `server/src/services/activity.ts` or activity queries, add `actorName` for user actors via LEFT JOIN on `authUsers`.

### 4. Heartbeat context enrichment
In `server/src/services/heartbeat.ts`, when building `contextSnapshot` for an issue run:
- Include `assigneeUser: { id, name, email }` if `assigneeUserId` is set
- Include `createdByUser: { id, name }` if the issue was created by a user

## ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA
- `GET /issues/:id` response includes `createdByUserName` and `assigneeUserName` when applicable
- `GET /issues/:id/comments` includes `authorUserName` on each comment
- Agent heartbeat contextSnapshot includes user identity objects
- `pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm test:run && pnpm build` passes

## VALIDATION
```bash
pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm test:run && pnpm build
```

Push when done:
```bash
git add -A && git commit -m "feat: enrich API responses with user names for agent recognition (Group 5)" && git push -u origin feat/multiuser-group5-people-recognition
```
